text.title: Kubernetes Production Readiness Core Rules
text.summary: ≥5 testable rules grounding the kubernetes methodology, each paired with rationale and source reference.

rule.statement: Every container MUST declare CPU + memory requests AND limits; base requests on observed P95, not guesses.
rule.rationale: Missing requests/limits triggers OOMKill or noisy-neighbour at the worst time — admission controllers can enforce this.

rule.statement: Configure startupProbe (slow-start apps), readinessProbe (traffic gating) and livenessProbe (deadlock recovery) on every container.
rule.rationale: Each probe addresses a distinct failure mode — collapsing them onto one creates measurable downtime.

rule.statement: Every container sets runAsNonRoot: true, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false and capabilities.drop ['ALL'].
rule.rationale: Together these four flags neutralise the most common container-escape primitives.

rule.statement: Define a PodDisruptionBudget for every Deployment with > 1 replicas; set minAvailable to at least 1 (or maxUnavailable = 1 for larger ones).
rule.rationale: Without a PDB, voluntary disruption (node drain, upgrade) can take the whole service down simultaneously.

rule.statement: Never use the 'latest' tag in production; pin to an immutable tag or — preferably — sha256 digest.
rule.rationale: latest re-tags silently; pinned digest is the only deploy-time-knowable image.

rule.statement: Use HPA for request-driven workloads, VPA for resource-request right-sizing and Karpenter or Cluster Autoscaler for nodes — these complement, not replace, each other.
rule.rationale: Each scaler addresses a different axis; treating them as substitutes leaves one axis unmanaged.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `Applies If` are not all true, do NOT run this methodology — return early with reason.
rule.rationale: Decision tree's negative branch must terminate cleanly without partial output.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold AND scope is explicit, run the methodology end-to-end and produce the canonical artefact.
rule.rationale: Decision tree positive-branch terminus; aliases the apply-end-to-end verdict.
